prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-BLKTHROWKNIVES-3PC-A1030-3-B Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: Black Stainless Steel Throwing Knife Set with Nylon Sheath 3 Pieces Description: Whether you're a beginner or an expert at knife throwing, you know you need a quality set of knives to ensure a good throwing experience. Our three-piece set of throwing knives is made of military-grade stainless teel with fixed blades, so you don't need to worry about your knife coming apart during use. In addition, they are easy to hold and have sharp points which are a necessary feature for any throwing knife.

Our knives are of the highest quality and require no future maintenance. They are extremely lightweight and are made of high-quality black stainless steel. Stainless steel is corrosion and rust-free, making these knives very low maintenance. Just make sure to wipe them off when you're done and you should have no problems.

These throwing knives come with a durable, nylon sheath with straps to keep your knives safe and secure while not in use. The sheath comes with a belt loop, so you can easily attach the sheath with your knives to your belt for quick access. The sheath itself is super lightweight and can easily fit inside of your pocket.

These knives are must-haves for collectors, enthusiasts, and throwing competitors. Search Terms: tactical throwing knives stainless steel black beginners sharp fixed blade with sheaths knife gift sets target blades practice competition Features: - HIGH QUALITY CONSTRUCTION - Our knives are made of military grade black stainless steel, which won't rust or corrode. Their stainless steel construction will ensure that you have a safe and fun throwing experience whether you're competing rain or shine. - GREAT FOR ALL LEVELS OF EXPERIENCE - These knives are designed to be used easily by beginners, intermediates or experts. The handles have an ergonomic design and measure just 5.5" in length, so you can easily travel with them. The knives are super-lightweight and don't take much strength to throw accurately. - DURABLE SHEATH INCLUDED - The throwing knives come with a durable black nylon sheath featuring slots for the knives to keep them safe and secure when not in use. The sheath also has a convenient belt loop so you can attach it to your belt for easy access. - FIXED STYLE BLADE - Our throwing knives have fixed blades, so you'll never have to worry about your knife coming apart during use or after a throw. The knives feature slots in the blade for aerodynamics to ensure that they soar accurately and precisely to your target. - SPECIFICATIONS - 3 Piece Knives, Material: Stainless Steel, Color: Black, Length: 5.5", Weight of Set: .18lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 3-Piece Black Stainless Steel Throwing Knives

anthropic.title_differentiation: Military Grade Fixed Blade, Includes Nylon Sheath With Belt Loop, Lightweight, Beginner To Expert, Corrosion Resistant

openai.title_differentiation: Military Grade Black Stainless Steel, Fixed Blade Aerodynamic Design, Nylon Sheath With Belt Loop, Beginner To Expert
